# GitHub Copilot — instructions (shim)

This project's substantive rules live under `.agent/` and are described in
`AGENTS.md`. Copilot reads `AGENTS.md` natively; this file augments that
for environments that look here specifically.

Required reading (in order):
1. `AGENTS.md`
2. `.agent/core/philosophy.md`
3. `.agent/core/conventions.md`
4. `.agent/core/boundaries.md`
5. `.agent/core/glossary.md`

Do not duplicate substance into this file. Edit the canonical `.agent/`
files; this shim reflects them automatically.
